'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 122''' was the one hundred twenty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 28]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Andy Lane]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]]

*[[Syal Antilles Fel|Wynssa Starflare]]
*[[Tierfon Rebel Outpost|Tierfon Rebel Base]]
*[[DC-GNK|Deesee (DC-GNK)]]
*[[HoloNet/Legends|Holographic Technology]]
*[[Ithorian Herdship|Ithorian Herd Ships]]
